title: verbascum × spurium subsp. dimorphum
intro: Verbascum × spurium subsp. dimorphum, also known as the Spurred Mullein or Dimorphic Mullein, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the figwort family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and calm digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. To utilize its medicinal properties, Verbascum × spurium subsp. dimorphum can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, allowing for its various health benefits to be harnessed in a range of herbal preparations.
